description: Uploaded 'Understanding C Pointers & Memory Layout', which laid the foundation for deep-dive technical education on the channel.
Launched the first free, open-source curriculum repository on GitHub, enabling peer-to-peer code review groups.
Passed 100,000 subscribers, signaling strong demand for high-fidelity, code-along video formats.
Delivered 'The Future of Full-Stack Architecture' to a crowd of 3,500 developers in Berlin, marking his first European keynote.
Released a custom, gamified interactive learning platform featuring live servers and real-time execution environments.
Reached 2.5 million subscribers on YouTube, with over 120 million total views spanning 180 countries.
